description: Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comforttitan logo at the 12 hour mark date aperture at the 6 hour markStainless steel strap with a butterfly claspBlack dial with silver handsScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters  allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 2 years
